title: phyllanthus graveolens subsp. micrandrus
intro: Phyllanthus graveolens subsp. micrandrus, also known as Phyllanthus amarus subsp. micrandrus, is a subspecies of the Phyllanthus graveolens plant, commonly found in tropical regions and used in traditional medicine. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus graveolens subsp. micrandrus include its ability to treat liver and kidney disorders, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
